consensus_variance.narrative: Street's ~$23.5 PT implies a re-rate toward EPD-parity (~7.7x EV/EBITDA / ~8.2x P/DCF on FY27E). We hold base at ~7.3x EV/EBITDA (7.5x P/DCF) because net leverage sits at the ~4.4x TOP of the 4.0-4.5x target (S1: Q1'26 10-Q $69,317M) and the K-1/UBTI structural discount persists. The ~18% magnitude compounds a ~9% multiple gap and a ~9% more-conservative FY27-28 EBITDA/DCF path. Two-tailed (backlog conversion is genuine upside) -> Buy below-Street, not Sell.
